name: Mifune
description: Mifune, known by the epithet "God of the Sword", is an infamous samurai and bodyguard who acts as a guardian to the little witch, Angela Leon. He is later blackmailed into the service of Arachnophobia by its head, Arachne Gorgon. He becomes involved in a somewhat one-sided rivalry with Black Star after the latter encounters him on a mission.
